channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TOTEM] Forbes Precision: Ravindra Kadam Resigns as Senior Manager - HRM
item.description:
Forbes Precision Tools and Machine Parts Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Ravindra Kadam, Senior Manager – Human Resource Management, effective April 22, 2026. The company has complied with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and has disclosed the information on its website.

  • Ravindra Kadam resigned as Senior Manager – HRM at Forbes Precision.
  • Resignation is effective from April 22, 2026.
  • The company complied with SEBI regulations regarding the disclosure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Forbes Precision Tools and Machine Parts Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [JACKSON] Jackson Investments Board Meeting on May 23, 2026
item.description:
Jackson Investments Ltd has scheduled a meeting of its Board of Directors on May 23, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company has informed the BSE about this meeting in compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 23, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results.
  • Results for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026.
  • Compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jackson Investments Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IIFLSEC] IIFL Capital Services Clarifies on Media Report
item.description:
IIFL Capital Services Ltd. responded to a media report dated April 21, 2026, and clarifications sought by BSE and NSE regarding potential negotiations and unusual trading activity. The company stated that while it explores strategic opportunities, there is no information requiring disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. IIFL Capital Services affirmed its commitment to regulatory compliance and transparency.

  • IIFL Capital Services addresses media report and exchange queries.
  • Company denies any undisclosed information impacting trading activity.
  • IIFL explores strategic opportunities but has no disclosable event currently.
  • Company commits to informing exchanges of any material developments.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IIFL Securities Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [TRIL] Transformers & Rectifiers FY26 Revenue Up 23% to ₹2,395 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Transformers & Rectifiers (India) Ltd (TARIL) reported strong FY26 results with revenue increasing by approximately 23% YoY to ₹2,395 crore. EBITDA rose by ~17% YoY to ~₹370 crore, and PAT increased by ~20% YoY to ₹225 crore. Q4 FY26 revenue grew by ~16% YoY to ₹752 crore, with PAT at ~₹77 crore. The company's unexecuted order book stood at around ₹5,005 crore as of March 31, 2026. TARIL is planning a capex investment of approximately ₹600 crore over the next 15 months.

  • FY26 revenue grew ~23% YoY to ₹2,395 crore.
  • FY26 EBITDA increased ~17% YoY to ~₹370 crore; PAT rose ~20% YoY to ₹225 crore.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue grew ~16% YoY to ₹752 crore; Q4 PAT at ~₹77 crore.
  • Order book at ~₹5,005 crore with FY26 inflows of ~₹2,374 crore.
  • Planned capex investment of ~₹600 crore over the next 15 months.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRANSFORMERS AND RECTIFIERS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RUBICON] Rubicon Research Receives ₹17.25 Cr Tax Demand
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rubicon Research Ltd. received an assessment order from the Income Tax Authority for AY 2023-24, with additions/disallowances of ₹20.68 Cr related to international transactions. The total demand raised is ₹17.25 Cr, subject to the outcome of an appeal. The company is filing an appeal and believes its position is strong.

  • Rubicon Research received an assessment order for AY 2023-24.
  • The order includes additions/disallowances of ₹20.68 Cr related to transfer pricing.
  • Total tax demand raised is ₹17.25 Cr, subject to appeal.
  • The company is filing an appeal and believes its position is strong.
  • A show cause notice has been issued for penalty proceedings under section 270A.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rubicon Research Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [KHOOBSURAT] Khoobsurat Ltd Board Meeting on May 21 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Khoobsurat Ltd has scheduled a meeting of its Board of Directors on May 21, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company has informed the BSE about this meeting in compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for QE/YE March 31, 2026.
  • Compliance with Regulation 29 of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Khoobsurat Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TECHKGREEN] Techknowgreen Responds to Price Movement Clarification
item.description:
Techknowgreen Solutions Ltd. responded to a clarification sought by the BSE regarding significant price movement in the company's security. The company stated that it is compliant with SEBI's LODR regulations and promptly disseminates all material information. As of the date of the response, there is no unpublished price-sensitive information or material event requiring disclosure. The company believes the price movement is purely market-driven and is unaware of any specific reason attributable to it. Techknowgreen assures continued adherence to regulatory disclosure requirements.

  • Techknowgreen complies with SEBI's LODR regulations.
  • No undisclosed price-sensitive information exists.
  • Price movement attributed to market dynamics.
  • Company unaware of specific reasons for price fluctuation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Techknowgreen Solutions Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [DUGARHOU] Green Horizon Fund PCC Cell 1 acquires 12.69% stake in Axentra Corp
item.description:
Green Horizon Fund PCC Cell 1 disclosed the acquisition of 25,00,000 equity shares, representing a 12.69% stake, in Axentra Corp Limited. The acquisition was made through a preferential allotment. Prior to this, Green Horizon Fund PCC Cell 1 held no shares. Post-acquisition, the total equity share capital of Axentra Corp Limited increased from ₹9,70,00,000 to ₹19,70,00,000, divided into 1,97,00,000 equity shares of ₹10 each. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Green Horizon Fund PCC Cell 1 acquired 12.69% of Axentra Corp.
  • The acquisition involved 25,00,000 equity shares.
  • Shares were acquired via preferential allotment.
  • Axentra Corp's equity capital increased to ₹19.70 Cr post-allotment.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI SAST Regulations 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DUGAR HOUSING DEVELOPMENTS LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [LT] L&T Energy GreenTech inks 300K TPA green ammonia deal with ITOCHU
item.description:
🔥 Trending

L&T Energy GreenTech Ltd (LTEGL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Larsen & Toubro, has signed a long-term partnership with Japan's ITOCHU Corporation. Under the agreement, LTEGL will supply ITOCHU with 300,000 tonnes of green ammonia per annum on a captive long-term take-or-pay basis from its proposed facility in Kandla, Gujarat. This agreement builds on a Joint Development Agreement from July 2025, solidifying the partnership from joint development to securing long-term demand. ITOCHU plans to use the green ammonia for its expanding green bunkering applications, particularly in Singapore, to decarbonize the maritime sector. The deal reinforces LTEGL's strategy to scale its green hydrogen and derivatives platform, positioning Kandla as a strategic export hub for low-carbon fuels, aligning with India’s National Green Hydrogen Mission.

  • LTEGL to supply 300,000 tonnes of green ammonia annually to ITOCHU.
  • The agreement is a long-term take-or-pay contract from Kandla, Gujarat.
  • ITOCHU will use green ammonia for green bunkering applications, especially in Singapore.
  • Partnership advances L&T's clean energy ambitions and global decarbonization efforts.
  • Supports India's National Green Hydrogen Mission and positions Kandla as an export hub.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LARSEN & TOUBRO LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [YESBANK] DB Trustee (HK) Ltd releases 8.49% Yes Bank shares from encumbrance
item.description:
DB Trustee (Hong Kong) Limited, acting as an offshore security agent for certain lenders, has disclosed the release of 2,664,580,360 equity shares of Yes Bank Limited from encumbrance. These shares constituted 8.49% of Yes Bank's total share capital. Prior to this release, DB Trustee, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PACs) including DWS Investment GmbH, held 8.49% of shares in encumbrance and 0.04% in shares carrying voting rights, totaling 8.53%. After the release, the encumbered shares are nil, and the total holding of DB Trustee and PACs stands at 0.04%. The release of shares from encumbrance took place on April 17, 2026. This action stems from a facility agreement dated April 24, 2023, where security was created on shares of Verventa Holdings Ltd (which held Yes Bank shares) in favor of DB Trustee.

  • DB Trustee (HK) Ltd released 2.66 billion Yes Bank shares from encumbrance.
  • This represents 8.49% of Yes Bank's total share capital.
  • The release of shares occurred on April 17, 2026.
  • Total holding of DB Trustee and PACs reduced from 8.53% to 0.04%.
  • The shares were previously encumbered under a facility agreement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: YES BANK LTD. | Category: Shareholding
